steps.title: Identify what the question asks you to emphasize
steps.content: The question specifically asks for a choice that emphasizes the different years the books reached the list. The notes give two years: 1993 for Secrets of a Sparrow and 2017 for The Crossover.

steps.title: Match the years to the choice
steps.content: Choice D explicitly names both years and structures them as a contrast—”in 1993...but in 2017”—making the temporal difference the focal point of the sentence. Choices A, B, and C either omit the years entirely or treat them as background information. That matches choice D — D is correct.
